content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 B12: Senior Product Designer (Remote) Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Spain, Mexico, Portugal, India </p> <div class="job__description body"><div><h3><strong>The role</strong></h3><br><p>We are an early-stage startup that is hiring an experienced Senior Product Designer to support our growing Product team. We are looking to bring on an individual who wants to positively impact the customer experience through the design of our products. From designing brand new product experiences to collaborating with engineers during implementation, you will be the go-to person for complex design challenges at B12.&nbsp;</p><br><h3><strong>As a Senior Product Designer, you will:</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li>Tackle complex and/or cross-team design challenges by:</li><br><ul><br><li>Thinking systematically about all elements of the customer experience.</li><br><li>Independently designing completely new product experiences.</li><br><li>Contributing to our design system.</li><br></ul><br><li>Support engineers as new designs are implemented.</li><br><ul><br><li>Providing guidance and consultation, creating additional wireframes as needed.&nbsp;</li><br><li>QAing and product reviewing your new designs as they are rolled out.</li><br></ul><br><li>Collaborate closely with Product Leadership to define the overall direction of the product.</li><br><li>Identify user needs and desires through qualitative research and quantitative insights.</li><br><li>Create user flows, wireframes, visual designs, and clickable prototypes.</li><br><li>Identify and experiment with new design tools for the team to use.</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>You’d be a good fit if:</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li>You have 5-8 years of experience in product design.</li><br><li>You have experience as an independent contributor owning all aspects of the design process from inception to implementation.</li><br><li>You have worked effectively with cross-functional teams, including Product Management, Engineering, Marketing, Customer Success, and Sales.</li><br><li>You are attentive to detail and apply a data-driven approach to understanding what's required for great user experiences.</li><br><li>You are confident working with Figma.</li><br><li>You have experience or interest in using AI design tools.</li><br><li>You have excellent written and verbal communication skills.</li><br><li>You have a BA/BS/BFA or equivalent industry experience.</li><br><li>You have experience in web design.</li><br><li>You have experience working and collaborating with diverse teams in a high-growth environment.</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>Don’t fear</strong></h3><br><ul><br><li>We’re somewhat flexible on the number of years of experience for this role. We highly favor talent, depth of experience, and interest.</li><br><li>Some candidates may see this list and feel discouraged because they don’t match all the items. Please apply anyway: there’s a good chance you’re more wonderful than you think you are.</li><br><li>B12 is a safe place for human beings. We particularly encourage you to apply if you identify as a woman, are a person of color or other underrepresented minority, or are a member of the LGBTQIA community.</li><br></ul><br><h3><strong>How to apply</strong></h3><br><p>Please provide:</p><br><ul><br><li>A pointer to your CV, resume, LinkedIn profile, portfolio, and any other summary of your career so far.</li><br><li>Some informal text introducing yourself and what you are excited about.</li><br></ul><br><p><strong>About B12:</strong></p><br><p>Our mission is to empower people to do meaningful work. B12’s AI-powered website builder has been used by over a million businesses and allows users to create a professional website in seconds. Our platform also provides tools for scheduling, payments, and email marketing. We’re a fully remote company, founded in 2015, and supported by investors like Breyer Capital, General Catalyst, SV Angel, and Tola Capital. Visit <a href="https://www.b12.io">https://www.b12.io</a> to learn more.</p></div></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/b12-senior-product-designer-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/b12-senior-product-designer-remote</a></p> Wed, 29 Apr 2026 08:35:24 +0000 Fri, 29 May 2026 08:35:24 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/b12-senior-product-designer-remote https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/b12-senior-product-designer-remote Perforce: Product Manager Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Ottawa, ON </p> <div class="content"><div class="section-wrapper page-full-width"><div class="section page-centered"><div><span>Perforce is a community of collaborative experts, problem solvers, and possibility seekers who believe work should be both challenging and fun. We are proud to inspire creativity, foster belonging, support collaboration, and encourage wellness. At Perforce, you’ll work with and learn from some of the best and brightest in business. Before you know it, you’ll be in the middle of a rewarding career at a company headed in one direction: upward.&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></div><div><span> &nbsp;</span></div><div><span>With a global footprint spanning more than 80 countries and including over 75% of the Fortune 100, Perforce Software, Inc. is trusted by the world’s leading brands to deliver solutions for the toughest challenges. The best run DevOps teams in the world choose Perforce. &nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><b>Position Summary:</b><span>&nbsp;</span></div><div><br></div><div><span>Perforce is searching for a Product Manager to join the Puppet team. The role will be responsible for defining the roadmap through performing research and collecting data from a series of stakeholders (internal/external). The Product Manager will connect the business outcomes, customer outcomes, strategy and technical plans via a product roadmap. Using their expertise in devops and platform automation, they must be able to articulate the necessary context and requirements for leading key, strategic capabilities in public cloud and private infrastructure.&nbsp;</span></div></div><div class="section page-centered"><div><h3>Requirements:</h3><ul class="posting-requirements plain-list"><ul><li>5+ years of experience in a product management or similar position&nbsp;</li><li>Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related technical field.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li><li>Excellent written
